overview: Shanmugha Arts Science Technology & Research Academy (SASTRA), deemed to be a university located in Thanjavur, Tamil Nadu, is a top-tier private institution known for its strong emphasis on research, balanced engineering programs, academic discipline, and consistent value-driven campus placements.
accreditation: Deemed to be University; NAAC A++ Accredited.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹85,000 per semester. One-time admission fee: ₹16,000. Hostel charges range from ₹10,000–₹22,000 per semester. Mess charges approximately ₹15,000–₹20,000 per semester.
₹75,000 per semester. Eligible GATE-qualified students receive ₹12,400/month stipend.

placements.totalOffers: 1,684+ UG students placed in recent graduating batch
placements.companiesVisited: Microsoft, Amazon, PayPal, Google, TCS, Cognizant, Wipro, IBM, Zoho, Deloitte, Capgemini
placements.internationalOffers: Select international and elite software engineering opportunities reported

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions to undergraduate engineering programs are based on a weighted combination of JEE Main scores and Class 12 board marks under different admission streams. Postgraduate admissions are based on qualifying examinations and national-level entrance tests where applicable.
admissions.importantDates: Admission timelines generally align with SASTRA academic admission schedules published annually.

campus.area: Main campus located in Thanjavur, Tamil Nadu
campus.specialNote: Tuition fees follow an approximate 5% yearly increment starting from the second academic year.

contact.address: SASTRA Deemed University, Tirumalaisamudram, Thanjavur – 613401, Tamil Nadu, India

availableScholarships.name: Dean’s Merit List Scholarship
availableScholarships.benefit: 10% – 20% tuition fee waiver per semester for top-performing students in each branch

availableScholarships.name: Desh-Videsh Scholarship
availableScholarships.benefit: Financial support for international internships and short-term research programs

availableScholarships.name: GATE Stipend
availableScholarships.benefit: ₹12,400 per month for eligible M.Tech students with valid GATE scores
